search_queries_used: site:doh.gov.ae osteoporosis fracture risk factors DEXA guideline Abu Dhabi
site:dha.gov.ae fracture risk endocrine guideline UAE
candidate_sources_rejected: automatic FRAX or fracture-risk category calculation
automatic DEXA, calcium, vitamin D, medication or referral
automatic diagnosis, investigation, treatment, medication, dose, procedure, referral, escalation, or discharge instructions
search snippets, landing pages, and broad source-family matches without an exact applicable section
rejection_reasons: Risk tools require exact clinician-entered inputs and approved local use.
No investigation, treatment or referral is generated.
Autonomous clinical output is outside this documentation-only research programme and was not mapped.
Only opened exact official documents and directly applicable sections were accepted as evidence.
population_applicability: Primarily adults over 50 years in the DoH screening population; younger adults, children, pregnancy and secondary bone disease require separate evidence.
UAE_applicability: UAE-direct DoH guidance applies in Abu Dhabi; facility screening and specialist pathways govern elsewhere.
recency_verification: DoH version 0.9 dated July 2019 was reviewed on 2026-07-14; no newer official replacement was identified.
superseded_check: No newer DoH osteoporosis-screening guideline was found.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact DoH fracture-risk section supports onset or interval history, functional impact, associated history, relevant negatives, patient goals and clinician risk context in an age-qualified osteoporosis-screening context without calculating risk.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports detailed risk history, fragility-fracture context, falls risk, FRAX and BMD context, and monitoring of treatment effects.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact risk-factor section supports measured weight or BMI, focused endocrine or musculoskeletal assessment, reviewed laboratory context and prior correspondence only when available.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports documenting falls, low calcium or vitamin D context, low weight, smoking or alcohol, medicine context, personal or family fracture history, and secondary causes.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact DEXA section supports clinician-entered plan and arranged follow-up after clinician review; it does not select DEXA, calculate FRAX or assign osteoporosis.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports clinician-reviewed DEXA reporting with age and risk qualifiers and without independently assigning a diagnosis.

unresolved_source_gaps: Age, sex, fracture history, falls, family history, smoking, alcohol, medicines, secondary causes, BMI, DEXA, FRAX, diagnosis and plan remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
